title: Add logos for buildah
body:
Thanks to Máirín Duffy for building these logos for thBuildah project

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat Oh, I missed that.  The link should probably be [this](https://cdn.rawgit.com/projectatomic/buildah/master/logos/buildah.svg), but it won't be valid until this is merged.

@nalind @TomSweeneyRedHat I fixed the link and fixed a few references to Buildah the project to be capitalized.  

I don't think you will see the logo until this is merged.

Travis CI is failing, looks like the RPM build test isn't happy?  The closest thing to an error that I can see is:
```
#   Running scriptlet: glibc-2.25-10.fc26.x86_64                            93/93BDB1539 Build signature doesn't match environment
# go-compilers-golang-compiler-1-11.fc26.x86_64 was supposed to be installed but is not!
```
Can't imagine this submit had anything to do with that, maybe a one off?
Hmmm.  Same rpm building error in Red Hat CI.

@rhatdan here's the error:

```
make[1]: Leaving directory '/root/gopath/src/github.com/projectatomic/buildah/docs'
can't load package: package github.com/projectatomic/buildah/vendor/github.com/ostreedev/ostree-go/pkg/otadmin: 
vendor/github.com/ostreedev/ostree-go/pkg/otadmin/admin.go:1:1: expected 'package', found 'EOF'
can't load package: package github.com/projectatomic/buildah/vendor/github.com/ostreedev/ostree-go/pkg/otremote: 
vendor/github.com/ostreedev/ostree-go/pkg/otremote/remoteadd.go:1:1: expected 'package', found 'EOF'
WARNING: deadline exceeded by linter varcheck on . (try increasing --deadline)
WARNING: deadline exceeded by linter varcheck on cmd/buildah (try increasing --deadline)
WARNING: deadline exceeded by linter vet on . (try increasing --deadline)
WARNING: deadline exceeded by linter vet on cmd/buildah (try increasing --deadline)
make: *** [Makefile:50: validate] Error 2
make: Leaving directory '/root/gopath/src/github.com/projectatomic/buildah'
### EXITED WITH CODE 2 AFTER 449s
```

Best guess is some problem with github (happens on occasion).  Though I dunno Go well at all, so maybe a problem w/ the code?

@rhatdan Aye, looks like a problem with github.  Try going here (I get EOF as well):

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/projectatomic/buildah/master/vendor/github.com/ostreedev/ostree-go/pkg/otadmin/adminupgrade.go
@cgwalters Why do these files exists. They are all empty  should ostree-go drop them?
Not having luck getting the test to kick off.  I'm gonna close and reopen this bad boy, that should do it.
Ok, tests kick off this time.
Yeah Green lights!  @rhatdan or @nalind, let's turn on the logo!
